sample_entries: Inbox placement shifted from opens to engagement depth
Gmail warns users about tracking pixels - disable completely
Step 1 email = 58% of all replies - prioritize first email quality
80/20 split: AI for research + human for strategy
First name tokens = spam flag. Business context = replies.
Too polished = AI detection flag. Casual beats perfect.
Warmup timeline increased from 7-14 to 14-21 days in 2026
Volume consistency > volume size. Daily sending patterns matter.
